name: authorkit-website
description: Marketing website for AuthorKit WordPress plugins

scripts.build:css:merge: cat css/design-tokens.css css/monochrome-components.css css/style.css > css/merged-legacy.css 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:css:full: npm run build:css:merge && NODE_ENV=production postcss css/input.css -o css/styles.min.css --config postcss.config.js
scripts.build:js: terser js/main.js -o js/main.min.js -c -m && terser js/bookshelf.js -o js/bookshelf.min.js -c -m && terser js/bookshelf-browse.js -o js/bookshelf-browse.min.js -c -m
scripts.build:all: npm run build:css:prod && npm run build:js && npm run build:images
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:css:full && npm run build:js
scripts.postbuild: echo '✅ Build complete. Run npm run test:perf to validate performance.'

author: AuthorKit
